---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem / motivation**
What problem would this solve? What are you trying to achieve?

**Proposed solution**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots here. Note that changes to core product
behavior may require a new Architecture Decision Record (see the ADRs in the
README).
